rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGINIA RAMOS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/20/2022. Second continuance same issues. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) The proposed order must be on pleading paper and must be re-done and a courtesy copy dropped off at the court in room 202. The judges signature cannot be on the last page by itself. Please review the Local Rules and California Rules of Court for proper formatting. 2) Notice of Hearing does not comply with the 10th amended general order of the probate and mental health division. 3) On petition page 2 lines 5-6 the petition alleges Letters Testamentary were issued when the petition alleges decedent died intestate and the court issued Letters of administration. 4) The property on hand at beginning of account must match the inventory and appraisal values. It appears the account must be amended to conform to Probate Code 1061 et seq. 5) Liabilities should be on a separate schedule in accordance with Probate Code 1063(g) not as part of the assets on hand at the beginning of the account. 6) On Schedule C - Disbursements please explain and file a receipt for entry 10/12/2021 Accounting Data for $1,200.00. 7) On Schedule C - Disbursements please explain the entries under Miscellaneous and file receipts for the following: a. 10/21/2019 for $47.08 b. 10/21/2019 for $10.00 c. 10/30/2018 for $1,173.63 d. 11/6/2018 for $59.83 e. 11/15/2018 for $176.82 f. 11/6/2018 for $80.16 g. 11/7/2018 for $32.14 8) On schedule C - Disbursements please explain entry 9/19/20219 for "Trust Record" for $300.00 and file a receipt. 9) On schedule C - Disbursements please file a receipts for the following entries: a. 8/16/2019 San Francisco Public Utilities Commission for $7,575.42 b. 8/24/2020 San Francisco Water for $4991.51 10) The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. Photocopies are not acceptable. See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. (See LRSF 14.34 D.) An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/4/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Inventory And Appraisal
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. No inventory and appraisal is on file. The filing deadline was 03/08/2022. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARILYN LEAL FAMILY TRUST, DATED JUNE 20, 1995 as Amended and Restated thereafter
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Probate Section 850 Petition To Recover Funds Distributed From Trust To Beneficiaries Without First Satisfying Assignment Lien, And
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/26/2022. Third continuance same issues. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. 2. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. 3. Must give 30 day's notice on the mandatory judicial council form DE-115. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/11/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the Court to determine if Norman Howard should be appointed Administrator. No petition has been filed yet by the (presumed) proponent of the lost will. The lost will is, therefore, not before the Court. Additionally, Proof of Service - Civil is inappropriate in PROBATE cases and meaningless in any event when nothing has been filed for which notice would be required. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHOW FAMILY TRUST DATED JUNE 2, 2003
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms Under Probate Code Sections 15403, 15409 (Prob C 17200(B)(13)
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/20/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) The court will not approve the appointment of Dennis Chow as GAL. Please file amended ex parte petitions for Guardian Ad Litem that seek appointment of a disinterested party as GAL. The notice of the ex parte must state that the ex parte will not be reviewed until a certain date - such date should be at least five days from the date notice is mailed. 2) Notice of the Petition will need to be re-done and given to the GAL after appointment. Notice of the remote appearance must be given no later than 30 days prior to the hearing. Please contact Examiner if a longer continuance is needed. 3) Once GAL's are appointed they will need to consent or reject the petition. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 3/28/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
